summary: Grounded 4 movement-driven scenes. Growth: 15.5% (2168 -> 2504). Key enrichments: Eastweald stubble, orchard, meal-wagon, and hedge road texture; embodied Farstrider relay hardware; Violet Citadel and Council of Six pressure on the sending stone; and Stratholme triage narrowed to Market Row bakehouses, granaries, and north service-gate lanes. Kept Jaina POV tight and the sanctum-room omission unresolved.
